name: Chocolate-Covered Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix almonds, sugar, and water in a heavy saucepan over medium-high heat for about 5 minutes until the mixture has a sandy texture and coats the almonds.
- While stirring, push the mixture up the sides to help crystalize the sugar.
2. Spread the almonds on a baking sheet covered with parchment paper and freeze.
3. Warm the chocolate until just melted (about 88°F).
4. Put the almonds into a bowl and pour half of the chocolate in, mixing vigorously to prevent clumping.
5. Add the rest of the chocolate and continue to stir until the almonds are well coated.
6. Roll the almonds in powdered sugar to coat.
